contributor_note: Seeded from common horticultural knowledge. Needs primary source verification.

habit.note: Gets very large — up to 2m. Needs deep soil and space. Garden only.

notes: Intense celery-like flavour. Traditional Scandinavian and Eastern European herb. Very cold-hardy perennial. One plant gives enormous yield — a little goes a long way. All parts edible: leaves, seeds, stem, root.
